text:
Israel’s intelligence reach inside Lebanon has been laid bare in recent years. Israeli forces have repeatedly called residents’ phones to warn them to evacuate targeted areas. In 2024, Israel carried out a covert operation in which explosive devices hidden inside pagers used by Hezbollah members were detonated simultaneously across Lebanon, exposing the depth of Israeli penetration of the group.
The leaflets followed warnings issued earlier on Friday by Israel’s defense minister, Israel Katz. He accused Lebanon’s government of failing to uphold its commitment to disarm Hezbollah, which for decades has been the crown jewel in Tehran’s network of proxies across the Middle East.
“The Lebanese government and the State of Lebanon will pay an increasingly hefty price in hits on national Lebanese infrastructure used by Hezbollah terrorists,” Mr. Katz said after the Israeli military struck a bridge in southern Lebanon that it said was being used by Hezbollah to transfer munitions.
title: Britain warns its citizens in Dubai they could be jailed for sharing photos of damage from airstrikes.
